sections.title: Standard dialogue
After Royal Trouble
When Princess Astrid is the player's consort

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, [Fremennik name].

sections.title: When nonromantically attached to Prince Brand

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, dear friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Prince Brand, will you marry me?

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: Oh, my darling, you've made me the happiest person alive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that a yes?

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: Yes! We'll have to put off the actual ceremony until we can find a priest, but I will tell my father I have agreed to marry you.

sections.title: When married to Prince Brand

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, darling.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you found a priest for our marriage yet?

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: I'm afraid not, darling. I don't think there is one to be had on these islands for love nor money...

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: Do not fear, though; I shall call for you as soon as one is found.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm having second thoughts about the wedding. This marriage would change things, with an increase in responsibilities and duties you were keen to avoid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: While I want to support the kingdom, I don't want that to end up impacting your life negatively. Maybe it's too soon to make this kind of decision.

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: You're right, I am not interested in more responsibilities. I would have less time for poetry! Is that your final decision?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I think it's for the best.

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: I think you'll make a great Thane for our kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe not. It it hard, for I am so very fond of you. Let's leave it as it is for now and see what the future holds.

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: Agreed.

sections.title: Using flowers on Prince Brand

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: No thank you, [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Prince Brand
lines.text: You've already given me some, but thank you.
